# Int. J. Production Economics, 203, 404-413

# Node indexing:
#   0          = Depot
#   1..25       = Customers
#   26..33     = Recharging Stations

# Coordinates in miles. Distances computed as Euclidean.
# Speeds in km/h. Demands in tons.
# Energy formula: E_ij = eff_d * eff_m * [alpha*(w+L)*d + beta*s^2*d]
#   with d in meters, s in m/s

60	80	60	30	40	40	40	30	80	40	80	30	30	40	80	30	60	40	40	80	0	80	80	40	40	80	60	60	40	80	80	40	60	60
40	80	40	60	30	60	60	30	40	80	30	60	30	30	80	60	60	30	80	60	60	0	40	80	80	80	30	40	40	60	40	40	30	30
30	40	80	80	40	40	40	60	30	40	80	40	60	40	60	30	40	80	40	30	40	30	0	40	60	80	30	60	60	60	30	30	60	80
80	40	60	40	40	30	40	40	30	60	30	60	40	80	30	30	40	30	60	60	60	60	30	0	80	30	60	80	80	80	40	60	80	40
40	80	60	30	40	40	40	60	60	30	30	60	40	40	80	30	40	40	40	30	60	40	60	30	0	30	60	40	30	60	40	80	40	30
30	40	30	40	60	40	60	40	40	40	40	30	40	40	30	30	30	80	60	30	80	80	40	30	30	0	80	40	80	60	40	40	60	40
60	60	60	30	30	30	80	30	80	60	40	30	60	60	60	40	60	30	30	60	80	80	40	40	30	80	0	60	80	40	80	30	30	40
40	60	60	40	40	30	40	30	80	30	80	30	60	40	80	40	30	40	40	30	40	80	80	40	30	80	30	0	80	60	60	60	30	80
60	60	80	60	40	80	80	80	60	80	60	80	30	40	60	40	80	30	60	80	40	80	30	80	40	80	30	40	0	80	30	40	80	40
30	40	60	30	60	80	80	30	30	80	30	60	30	40	80	30	80	30	60	80	60	60	80	60	30	80	30	30	60	0	30	80	30	60
40	80	30	30	30	40	60	30	40	40	40	60	80	40	60	30	60	30	30	80	80	80	60	30	30	80	40	40	60	40	0	30	40	80
30	30	60	60	60	60	30	40	80	30	60	40	40	60	30	60	40	30	80	60	30	80	40	40	40	60	40	30	30	60	80	0	80	30
60	60	30	40	80	80	80	40	30	80	60	30	30	60	30	80	60	60	30	40	80	30	40	80	40	60	60	80	40	40	80	60	0	60
30	60	40	80	60	40	80	30	40	30	60	30	60	30	30	80	60	80	60	80	30	40	30	80	80	60	30	80	30	60	30	60	40	0

EOF
